programmes.show_description: From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
Ibiza in the 90s, what a time to be alive! Join Judge Jules and his hand picked Balearic breakdowns, pumping basslines and killer beats. Lets go back to the party island!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she chooses her 50 most iconic but very proper clubland classics of all time! Banger after banger, this will not disappoint.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Join Nick Chicane for an immersive journey through 30 ultimate sundown anthems. With Moby, Orbital, Enigma and of course, Chicane. Turn on and chill out.
Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
Kickstart your weekend with Clubland's electrifying 00s Warm Up! Get ready for non-stop floorfillers with over 50 iconic party anthems from 2000 to 2009.

We've raided the Clubland vaults and decided to mix things up a bit! Enjoy some of the most awesome classics there are, mixed and mashed up to perfection.

Lessons in love - dancefloor style. Sixty tunes that are all about love, but you'll not find any slushy ballads here!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
Starting in with the vinyl hits of 80s, the CD singles of the 90s, The downloads of the 2000s and finishing with today streaming hits. This is the evolution of dance!
